assertions.expectation: Explains that Extended channel provides up to 24 months of support vs 14 months for standard channels
assertions.reason: Response clearly states 'Longer support lifecycle: 24 months vs 14 months for Regular channel'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended channel has additional cost (it's not free)
assertions.reason: No mention of additional costs or pricing for Extended channel

assertions.expectation: Notes that Extended channel gets the same versions as Regular but keeps them available longer
assertions.reason: Response suggests Extended gets versions 8-12 months later ('Delayed features') but doesn't clarify it's the same versions kept available longer

assertions.expectation: Warns that staying on older versions longer means missing new features and accumulating technical debt
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'Delayed features: New Kubernetes features arrive 8-12 months later' and 'Ecosystem lag' which addresses technical debt concerns

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command to change the release channel to Extended
assertions.reason: Includes specific command: 'gcloud container clusters update CLUSTER_NAME --release-channel=extended --region=YOUR_REGION'

assertions.expectation: Advises checking that the current version (1.31) is available on Extended before switching
assertions.reason: Explicitly states to wait for 1.31 in Extended and provides command to check availability

assertions.expectation: Recommends Extended for environments with compliance requirements or slow internal change processes
assertions.reason: No specific mention of compliance requirements or slow internal change processes as use cases

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended doesn't mean you can skip upgrades forever — you still must upgrade within 24 months
assertions.reason: No explicit warning about mandatory upgrades within the 24-month window

assertions.expectation: Notes that minor version upgrades on Extended are NOT automated (except at EoS) — customers must plan and initiate them manually
assertions.reason: No mention of manual upgrade requirements or that upgrades are not automated on Extended channel
